reviews.comment:
Hace años que cargo NAFTA en el ACA , siempre algún problema hay , ahora no funciona el sistema cuando se paga con la APP justo el día de mayor descuento . No sé entregaron pelotas del mundial ni camisetas de la selección de fútbol , solo importa la plata 🤷

(Translated by Google)
I've been loading NAFTA into the ACA for years, but there's always some problem. Now, the system doesn't work when paying with the app on the day of the biggest discount. No World Cup balls or national soccer team jerseys were given out; only the money matters.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/15009815123652831665/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUQtczdlaHlnRRAB
